parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "text": '🔥 High-priority lead: ' + $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.name + ' (' + $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.company + ') — score ' + $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.lead_score + '/10. ' + $('Normalize Lead Data').item.json.next_action } }}

parameters.content:
## 🤖 Demo 2 — AI Lead Qualification

**Trigger:** the live landing-page contact form POSTs `{ name, email, company, biztype, bottleneck, newsletter }` to this webhook.

**What fires, in order:**
1. Build the Claude request from the form fields
2. Claude Haiku 4.5 scores the lead and returns JSON (score, industry, intent, priority, opportunity range, summary, next action)
3. Code node strips any fences, parses the JSON, maps priority to the emoji option
4. Create the scored record in the Notion CRM
5. Respond `{ status: "ok", score }` to the form
6. If score ≥ 7, fire the optional Slack alert

**Credentials needed:** Anthropic API (httpHeaderAuth, header name `x-api-key`) + Notion. Slack node is disabled by default — paste your Incoming Webhook URL and enable it to use it.
